title: Bothriocline muschleriana
taxonomy: Bothriocline muschleriana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It belongs to the genus Bothriocline, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Africa. The species Bothriocline muschleriana is further classified under the family Asteraceae, which comprises a vast array of flowering plants, including daisies, sunflowers, and asters. Further classification of Bothriocline muschleriana can be made at the rank of infraspecific, but this information is not readily available.
